'''Milo Thirk''' was the [[Intelligence Bureau Chief]] for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] in the [[Bespin system/Legends|Bespin system]]. Thirk gathered information about [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City's]] new [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], for Alliance Intelligence officer [[Eddriss Sark]] by engaging Calrissian in small talk during several friendly games of [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]], during which Calrissian won 5,700 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], which Thirk attempted to get reimbursed as an expense. Thirk concluded that, though Calrissian had no love for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he was unlikely to give up the security and luxury of his position to actually join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]; however, Thirk also noted that Calrissian was honorable (though not totally honest), and thus could probably be dealt with.<ref name="SWS" />
